title: gymnogramma palmata
intro: Gymnogramma palmata, also known as the palmate Gymnogramma, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gymnogramma palmata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve digestion. Gymnogramma palmata can be prepared for medicinal use in various forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
